audit_items.proof_trace: Every zfree() call on a server config pointer (logfile, acl_filename, masteruser, masterauth, rdb_filename, cluster_announce_ip, slave_announce_ip, etc.) is immediately followed on the very next line by a new assignment, leaving no window for a dangling dereference. Error paths—loaderr calls exit(1) and badfmt only sends an error reply—neither accesses any freed pointer. Local SDS allocations (v, copy, aclop) are freed exactly once, before any subsequent access to those variables.
